name: Anarchy
description: No government, no police, high crime.

name: Capitalist State
description: Fair trade, minimal interference, strong economy.

name: Communist State
description: Society over individual, strong police, corruption.

name: Confederacy
description: United states, moderate police, varied tech.

name: Democracy
description: Majority rule, moderate police, rich population.

name: Dictatorship
description: Single ruler, strong police, wealthy elite.

name: Fascist State
description: Military rule, strong police, illegal goods harshly punished.

name: Feudal State
description: Small countries, no police, pirates thrive.

name: Military State
description: Army rule, incorruptible police, robots in demand.

name: Monarchy
description: King, moderate police, medicine in demand.

name: Pacifist State
description: Peaceful, minimal police, natural resources valued.

name: Socialist State
description: Welfare, weak/corrupt police, unofficial illegal trade.

name: State of Satori
description: Zen-like, little interest in goods, no crime.

name: Technocracy
description: Tech solutions for all problems, strong police.

name: Theocracy
description: Religious rule, illegal goods forbidden, slow science.
